import { PageProps as InertiaPageProps } from '@inertiajs/core'; import { AxiosInstance } from 'axios'; import { route as ziggyRoute } from 'ziggy-js'; import { PageProps as AppPageProps } from './'; declare global { interface Window { axios: AxiosInstance; } /* eslint-disable no-var */ var route: typeof ziggyRoute; } declare module '@inertiajs/core' { interface PageProps extends InertiaPageProps, AppPageProps {} }
